entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now Information Sessions (European Friendly Times)

Shane

entry.title: When migrating sales order data by Migrate Your Data-Migration Cockpit app.The following warning
entry.content:
Hello.I want to export data of "Cutomer : Ctry-Spec.Enh." tab in customer master (Company Codes.)However, if I output master data by Export Master Data-Business Partners app, those data is not exported,
and I can't find CDS view that have those data.Cannot I export   "Cutomer : Ctry-Spec.Enh." tab data?
Plaese help.

entry.title: Re: Combining SAP Fiori Freestyle and List Report Pages i...
entry.content:
Hi,

I am assuming you are talking about Fiori elements OData V4. What is allowed is to have a separate tab and then define your custom view there see https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/eb37203f2b884b5097c3c858107cae1f for more details. This means there is no way to remove the default table that shows up in LR, but you could always define additional custom views that show up in extra tabs in the List Report.

Best Regards,

   Sandeep

entry.title: Re: Configuration Transport Center - Preparing Transport Request from Source tenant
entry.content:
Please look into the Implementation Design Principle - link

We will soon arrange a webinar to get the common doubts answered on configurations. Dates will be communicated via the SAP SuccessFactors IDP newsletter.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to Career Corner

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Landscape Architecture & Life-cycle Management
entry.content:
Hi Matthew,

Thanks for the information.

Can you share information on what is the available storage on public SAC and options to have additional storage for importing data and planning.

Thanks,

entry.title: How to show total at the end of SAC tables created by linking two BW Live Models
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have created a SAC table , sourced from 2 live models linked via the common dimensions between them.

Table Columns :- Have measures (yellow coming from 1st Live model )

                                            (Orange coming from 2nd Live model)

                                            (Blue are the calculated measures within the story)

There are 3 dimensions listed here , we want to see Total in the end by Planting (i.e. the first dimension)

When we hover the mouse on the Planting dimension header, the total option is greyed out (this behaviour is true for the other 2 dimension listed in the table below).

Is there a way we can show Total in the bottom?

Regards,

Zeenat S

entry.title: Re: ATP check at Sales Contract
entry.content:
Hi Priya,

I came across similar situation to have availabiity check to reserve stock for contracts. I activated the check for Cotnactact item, created sales order with refernce to contact, then develiry etc. In MD04, all were shown as your requirmeent. 

Regards

Rajendra

entry.title: DIEN or Service masters?
entry.content:
Hi!

We already use the material DIEN (ZDIEN for purchasing) to process services.
We are now planning to start using PM orders.
What are the risks if we continue to use DIEN instead of the service masters?
What is the best practice?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP Management of Change - tables where answers to qu...
entry.content:
Step 1 : I_ChgMgmtRequest (/iam/d_i_root)

, we will the change request ID and get the UUID.

 

Step2 : I_ChgMgmtActivity(/iam/d_act_root): Pass the UUID.

 

Step3 : Pass the Activity template (RSK, PST-1 etc in the field act_template(table) ChgMgmtActyTemplate(CDS view).

Step4 : Pass the activity UUID into I_ChgMgmtActyDescription and get the code subgroup.

Step 5 : 

pass it to /IAM/C_CODE_T for code text

/IAM/C_CODEGR_T for Code group text.

 

For step 3 we need to take the help from technical team since its a CDS view.

Regards

Pramod K.B

entry.title: How to fetch Current User's Email Address in BTP RAP Method
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need to fetch the Current User's Email Address in my BTP RAP Method but the Class "cl_abap_context_info" don't have any method to fetch the same.

Please help hot to get the Email Address of the user..

Thanks,

BTP Learner

entry.title: SIチェック、Readness Check、ATC分析について
entry.content:
１．Readiness checkを実施しないことでどういった影響が出ますでしょうか。
２．SIチェック、ATC分析、Readiness Checkは、バージョンアップ後の新サーバ(S/4HANA2023)で実施しても問題ありませんでしょうか。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SIチェック、Readness Check、ATC分析について
entry.content:
＞１．Readiness checkを実施しないことでどういった影響が出ますでしょうか。
→アップグレードの前に、プロジェクトに支援を提供するものですので、お客様の需要に応じていただければよいです。
実施しなくても影響がございません。

＞２．SIチェック、ATC分析、Readiness Checkは、バージョンアップ後の新サーバ(S/4HANA2023)で実施しても問題ありませんでしょうか。
→バージョンアップ前のシステムで実施する必要がございます。
詳細につきまして、以下のKBAをご参照ください。
3059197 - SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA upgrades 
=>You are either considering or planning an upgrade of an existing SAP S/4HANA system to a new product version. As a result, you want to analyze your existing SAP S/4HANA system with the SAP Readiness Check tool for SAP S/4HANA upgrades, to help scope and plan your project.
SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA upgrades supports SAP S/4HANA 1511 or higher.

entry.title: How to update multiple PR line items using a standard API
entry.content:
Hello,

        We are using a standard PR API for creation of purchase requisition with multiple line items using AIS (Azure integration service). Now our issue is when we are trying use a patch call to update multiple line items of the PR (ex change of quantity of line item 10, 20, 30....), the 1st line is getting updated, but  when AIS is trying to update 2nd line item getting an error- "User XXX cloud connector, SBP already processing purchase Requisition XXXXX".

Is it not possible to update the multiple line items of a PR via single update patch call of the PR requisition.

Please let me know the possible way.

Link to standard API: https://api.sap.com/api/OP_PURCHASEREQUISITION_0001/overview

 

Regards

Venu

entry.title: DIEN or Service masters?
entry.content:
Hi!

We already use the material DIEN (ZDIEN for purchasing) to process services.
We are now planning to start using PM orders.
What are the risks if we continue to use DIEN instead of the service masters?
What is the best practice?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere JDBC, ODBC, or other method for readin...
entry.content:
Hello,

as far as I'm aware there are two ways to write Data to Datasphere:

  1. Integrating Data via Database Users/Open SQL Schemas
    https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/be5967d099974c69b77f4549425ca4c0/3de55a78a4614deda589633baea28645.html?locale=en-US
  2. Unsing an HDI Container
    This is case when the Data is written from a SAP BAP(Business Application Studio)
    https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/be5967d099974c69b77f4549425ca4c0/1aec7ca95af24208a61c1a444b249d95.html?locale=en-US

However I would rather use another approach using the SAP "Standard" and read the data instead of pushing(write) it into the Datasphere.
There are a LOT of supported Connecionts, just search for your's: 
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/be5967d099974c69b77f4549425ca4c0/1aec7ca95af24208a61c1a444b249d95.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: Hybris 2211 : SmartEdit date picker prefilled with th...
entry.content: Please check if customisation to DateTimePickerComponent.ts —> handleDatePickerChange could help. Plan to add logic to OOTB so that optional date/time picker field in OOTB wouldn’t be automatically filled.

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI History not getting saved

Its help.

Thanks.

entry.title: Want to delete DRAFT entries in bulk mode
entry.content:
I want to delete the DRAFT from year 2019. How can I delete in bulk mode?

Or can run a query to delete the DRAFT??

I create the following query. when I run query by DocNum, it works But if i add posting date selection, it gives error "1). [Microsoft][ODBC Driver 13 for SQL Server][SQL Server]The conversion of a varchar data type to a datetime data type resulted in an out-of-range value. 'User-Defined Values' (CSHS)" 

What should I do, to run the query by date selection option.

 

DELETE FROM

ODRF
WHERE
--DocNum = '20129';
DocDate = [%0] and DocDate = [%1] ;

entry.title: Looping Process Call and Poll Enrich to read multiple files from the SFTP Server.
entry.content:
Hi, I am using Looping Process Call and Poll Enrich to read multiple files from the SFTP Server. 
In the SFTP adapter, in Post-Processing , i have selected Keep File and Mark as Processed in Idempotent Repository because if i choose Keep file and Process Again then it is reading only one file and the loop is running infinitely. Also, I can't choose Move file and Delete file because of restrictions.

My question is if the file is read and at some point in my iFlow if i get any error then i have to reprocess that file. But due to using "Keep File and Mark as Processed in Idempotent Repository", I am not able to read the file again.

How can i solve this issue?
Is there any where i can mark that file as unprocessed in the Idempotent Repository?
or any other solution.

Regards,
Abhinav

SAP Integration Suite Cloud Integration

entry.title: Re: Can you remove Onboarding business process error mess...

entry.title: Re: Custom Code Migration app - Known Problems & Solutions

S_ADMI_FCD / SCMD -> Read ABAP Call Monitor Data

entry.title: I have a 3 party tool that need read access to tables in SAP BW Hana DB - do i need a license?
entry.content:
Hi

We are going to use SAC planning going forward. We are going to save the data in an aDSO. We have a customer that also have a 3 party tool that want to read from this specific aDSO but from the database using the active table of the aDSO. we are not going to transfer the data, just read access.

so when the data is saved into the aDSO and activated, the data will be shown in the 3 party tools when they run the reports there.

We have a plan for this, but the question is of this demands some kind of license. Anyone knows that?

entry.title: Re: The recommendation/best practices to upload of Orders...
entry.content:
1. According to your description, so far you have not started to do the import via impex, here is the official help doc about impex, suggest you to go through this doc first.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_CLOUD_PUBLIC_CLOUD/aa417173fe4a4ba5a473c93eb730a417/1b6dd3451fc04c3aa8e95937e9ef2471.html?locale=en-US

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_CLOUD_PUBLIC_CLOUD/aa417173fe4a4ba5a473c93eb730a417/8bee24e986691014b97bcd2c7e6ff732.html?locale=en-US

2 please try to avoid the other running cronjob when doing import via impex. as multiple cronjob running on the same time could cause performance issue

entry.title: Re: Does an MRP run delete or cancel planned orders if th...
entry.content:
Hello @PMoyo 

MRP will delete planned orders if they are not needed anymore and if they are not fixed.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: How to handle Purchase Orders and Sales Orders with Old Material Numbers?
entry.content:
We are in the process of replacing around 9000 Materials with New Material Codes (This is done to activate Automatic Batch Split Valuation). Old Material Numbers will be maintained in MARA-BISMT. Stock will be moved to new material code. I have a few questions regarding this.

1. Should existing Purchase Orders and Sales Orders be closed before I do this activity? Or is there a way to use the new material codes to do goods receipt for existing POs and deliveries for existing SOs?

2. How do I handle sales return of older sales orders?

entry.title: Wireframe libraries / tools for MDK apps
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am interested in experimenting with wireframing for MDK applications, specifically for iOS devices. Currently, I can access the Figma library for the BTP SDK for iOS Native SDK(https://experience.sap.com/fiori-design-ios/article/design-kit-24-4/) , but I'm unable to find similar resources for MDK SDK controls. Given that MDK utilizes the BTP SDK for iOS to generate controls, yet not all SDK controls are available in MDK, what would you recommend as the best approach to wireframing for MDK apps where there are limited controls and properties available?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Is it possible to combine multiple Fiori floor plans to create a single application
entry.content:
Hi all ,
     In my case, I want to develop an application with custom Fiori UI and also List and object page as well, need to navigate between multiple paged so , I thought of combining both basic and List report floor plan of Fiori UI.
    Using List report floor plan will increase my productivity and Basic Floor plan will increase flexibility.

    Is it possible to combine those floorplans to develop a single application?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Combining SAP Fiori Freestyle and List Report Pages i...
entry.content: Thank you @junwu, How to achieve that ?

entry.title: Re: Exposing a SOAP service in BTP, ABAP
entry.content:
Hello Felix,

Here is an overview of the steps to help you out:

Creating a Communication Scenario

  1. You need to create a communication scenario as described in Defining a Communication Scenario Including Authorization Values. This guide will help you define communication scenarios, which can be used to access business services using a technical communication user.

Generating Provider Proxies From WSDL Files

  1. Based on the WSDL file of the service you want to provide, create an SPRV as described in Creating SOAP Service Providers.
  2. Activate the SPRV.
  3. Add the generated inbound service to the relevant communication scenario.
  4. Publish the communication scenario locally to make it available for the administrator in SAP Fiori launchpad.

Add implementation logic to generated class

  1. The SPRV generates an implementing class of the service you want to provide. To provide the functionality of your service, add the required application logic to the generated implementing class. Afterwards, activate the implementing class.

Configure communication arrangement based on communication scenario

  1. Based on the communication scenario, the administrator can create a communication system, inbound user, and communication arrangement, to make the service available for consumption. For more information, see Communication Management.

All of this should also be described in Generate Provider Proxies From WSDL Files.

Best regards,
Peter

entry.title: Re: Production order confirmation via custom design
entry.content:
Hi 

it sounds like mixing in Master data ... 

> check in the linerouting at last operation : Control Key .. maybe you have here also "do the Posting - 101" 

> also check the stuff with: Serialnumber > create Equipment..  

Robert

entry.title: Re: The current widget is already exporting, or there are...
entry.content:
As far as we noticed, the problem occurs on the first pages in the Story, and Excel Export scripts work correctly on the following pages. So we temporarily created a new blank page and hid it. This is how the script works.

However, there is something to pay attention to: It adds a Version column to the table of the relevant page and resets the Measure filter in the table.

entry.title: Collaborate on your SAP Build Code project with your teammates!
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We are excited to launch another much-awaited feature in SAP Build Code - you can now collaborate on any Build Code project with your colleagues with ease.

SAP Build Code adheres to Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC) best practices. This means that you can connect any SAP Build Code project easily to a source control system for version management. The SAP Build Code development environment comes with a simplified Git panel that lets you do exactly that. You can read more about it here.

Once the project is in a source control repository, you can easily add teammates to your project from the SAP Build Lobby and start collaborating with them.

Let’s see an example:

  1. Create your project in SAP Build Code.

2. Write your application code (with the help of Joule, or with the graphical modelers, or even manually). Here, I have created three data entities, some sample data, OData services, and a SAP Fiori elements UI application. 

3. Next, go to your source control system and create a new repository. In this example, I use Github, but you can use any git-based source control.

4. Copy the repo URL. We will use this in the next step.

5. Open the simplified Git panel, click on Add Remote Repository button and add the URL of the git repo.

6. Once connected, you can either check in your code to the main branch or create a new branch. Next, click on Commit and Sync button to check in your code.

7. Now, return to the SAP Build Lobby, locate your project, and click on Options (…) and Manage Members.

8. You can now add your teammates with either a Developer or an Administrator access.

Note: if your project is not yet shared with a source control repository, you will get this message:

9. Next, go to your Git repository and add your colleague as a collaborator.

And that is all!

Next, let’s see what happens when your colleague tries to access the shared project

 1. The colleague logs into the SAP Build Lobby and can see the shared project in his/her list.

2. When s/he clicks on the project, s/he will be asked to choose a dev space. They can leave the recommended dev space as-is and click Select.

3. The project is cloned to the colleague’s dev space. Since the Git repo is private, s/he will be prompted for credentials.

4. Once the git repo is cloned, your teammate can now access the project and work on it.

We hope that this new feature simplifies your experience of collaboration across SAP Build Code projects. You can read more about it here.

Until next time, happy coding!

entry.title: 2 BO groups of conflicting folder permissions
entry.content:
Hi All,

   For SAP BO Webi, if a user is a member of two different groups, and each group has been assigned different rights to the same folder. For example, user is assigned to group 1 which has Full Control to folder A. Additionally, user is assigned to group 2 which only has View On Demand (lesser privilege, eg: cannot edit the report) access to folder A. What access rights will eventually take effect for the user to folder A?

Thanks!

entry.title: Integration between Recruiting and a Corporate Website - Job Postings
entry.content:
Hi Team.

I am trying to build an integration between SF Recruiting & a corporate website. I can find all of the data points I need, but I don't know on which data points to filter to only receive the active job postings on the external career website.

Does anyone have the answer to this?

entry.title: Re: Even more Flexibility in Adaptation using Screen Personas Scripting with Mobile RF Devices in Wa
entry.content:
Hi @mhassau,

I have to admit that I am not an expert in JavaScript and web security. Other colleagues might be better experts.
I assume this is connected to your attempt to access resources from cross origin. In the example provided within this blog we stay on the same server. Without knowing the exact error and the response headers in your case it is hard to tell what exactly is going on. A typical solution is to use some kind of a reverse proxy like SAP WebDispatcher to bring required resources under the same origin.

Best regards, Tobias

entry.title: Re: Robosapiens and SAPGUI Library in Robot Framework: At...
entry.content:
Hello @AutomationTester,

it seems that the network settings of your connection are set to low speed connection. if you use the Low Speed Connection, problems can occur in SAP GUI Scripting, because the field names are not available in full, only as number in brackets. Set the network settings to High Speed Connection and it should work.

Best regards
Stefan

entry.title: Re: Write to a text file from within script?
entry.content:
Hi,

I think I have never done this myself within a script.

Have you thought about building a dataflow for it? It should give you the same result.

I.e: Use a Row_Generator that creates one row. Add a Query and add some target columns such as date, config etc. Then Map these fields with the functions from your last post.

Afterwards write into an output .txt file of which the filename is generic and consists of the jobname and runtime or similar.

You could then also use this dataflow generically in all of your jobs.

Edit: Had some time to check myself - you can do the following in a script:

 

$sysdate = sysdate();

exec('cmd', 'echo Date of Execution: [$sysdate] > //<YourPath>/DIR1/DIR2/Testlog.txt' ,8);

 

Or if you do not want to declare each and every variable within the Job Object:

 

set_env('DATE', sysdate());

exec('cmd', 'echo Date of Execution: '||get_env('DATE')||' > //<YourPath>/DIR1/DIR2/Testlog.txt' ,8);

 

Of course you can add any Parameter you want to this - that's just the baseline. Use ">" to write to file or ">>" to append to file.

Julian

entry.title: SAP Datasphere connection with SAP ECC and SAP CRM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to build a data lake architecture in SAP Datasphere. The source systems will be SAP ECC 6.0 EHP 7 and SAP CRM ABAP 7.0 (EHP 1). Are these version of the source systems compatible with Datasphere and what should be the best way to ingest data from these sources?

Any help is appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: Different number appears instead of user name in Messages/Alerts Overview
entry.content:
Hi, 

Different number appears instead of user name in Messages/Alerts Overview. See attached. Any idea?

entry.title: Re: Do changing the usage of routing after production ord...
entry.content:
Hello kraghavanbindhu ,

I tested this scenario in SAP ECC, as per my testing, I have not found any errors while prod.  order execution. Errors will be generated when you try to do read PP master data to update changed routing in Prod. order. 

Let me give steps here from my end for testing this scenario.

Step 1 --> Create Prod. Order with Routing for which Usage is 3 

Step 2 --> Change Routing Usage 3 to 1 

Step 3 -->   You can try for Read PP Master Data to update changes in prod. order, you will notice error here also proceed with release of order and perform all steps till TECO.

entry.title: SAP Sapphire 2024 Day 1 is in the books: It's all about the Future of AI and Cloud Innovation
entry.content:
AI Where? Everywhere!

SAP is putting AI into every corner of its cloud portfolio. Think AI-driven insights in SuccessFactors and predictive tools in Sales Cloud. It’s all about smarter, faster business processes​ (Dutch IT Channel)​.

Big-Time Partnerships

As we have seen with the SAP Datasphere partnerships with Databricks, Google, Colibra and the likes. SAP cannot win the game on its own. Therefore also in the AI space, SAP is teaming up with tech giants to boost its AI game:

  • Google Cloud: Integrating SAP Joule with Google Cloud’s Gemini models for better supply chain management​ (ERP Today)​.
  • Meta: Using Meta’s Llama 3 in SuccessFactors and Analytics Cloud​ (TechTarget)​.
  • Mistral AI: Adding Mistral's large language models to SAP AI Core​ (TechTarget)​.
  • NVIDIA: Enhancing AI assistants and creating digital twins for industrial apps​ (TechTarget)​.

In my view, NVIDIA is the game changer (kitty down 😀) here.

AI Assistants and Ethical AI

Joule, SAP’s AI assistant, is now in more apps like S/4HANA Cloud and Integration Suite. Plus, SAP is committed to ethical AI, following UNESCO’s guidelines​ (Dutch IT Channel)​​ (ERP Today)​. As listed yesterday in my blog on hot AI sessions, its all about reliable and ethical appropriate models. See the sessions from Dr. Bettina Laugwitz for more on the topic.

New AI Features

SAP unveiled generative AI in its Business Technology Platform, using models from AWS and Meta. This includes integrating with Microsoft 365’s Copilot for deeper insights​ (TechTarget)​.

Dual Focus: Cloud and AI

SAP Sapphire 2024 focused on both cloud migration and AI innovation, showing real-world benefits like increased productivity with the Joule AI assistant​ (TechTarget)​.

Partner Ecosystem and Sustainability

SAP stressed the importance of partners in AI and cloud transitions, with new tools to help businesses find the right expertise. They also introduced features in the Sustainability Control Tower and Footprint Management to help companies track their sustainability efforts​ (TechTarget)​.

Wrapping Up

SAP Sapphire 2024 was all about pushing boundaries with AI and cloud tech. These advancements are set to make businesses more agile and innovative, crucial for staying competitive.

SAP is playing catch up, but is in it to win it!

Looking forward to day 2!

entry.title: Re: Distribution of Article Hierarchy via IDOCS
entry.content: But, this T Codes only allow to download the Activated one. How to download the Planned one.

entry.title: SAP AI Core Azure Blob storage SAS token RESPONSE 403 AuthenticationFailed
entry.content:
I am trying to connect our Azure Blob Storage to SAP AI Core using a SAS token.

sp=racwdlme&st=2024-06-03T14:15:54Z&se=2025-06-02T22:15:54Z&spr=https&sv=2022-11-02&sr=d&sig=xxxx%3D&sdd=3

The SAS token works fine via the browser. 

The Object Store Secret looks like the following: 

{
"CONTAINER_URI": "https://xxx.blob.core.windows.net/<container>",
"STORAGE_ACCESS_KEY": "sp=racwdlme&st=2024-06-03T14:15:54Z&se=2025-06-02T22:15:54Z&spr=https&sv=2022-11-02&sr=d&sig=xxxx%3D&sdd=3"
}

with path prefix aaa/bbb/ccc

But when trying to copy the files in the execution via SAP AI Core I always get the following error:

RESPONSE 403: 403 Server failed to authenticate the request. Make sure the value of Authorization header is formed correctly including the signature. ERROR CODE: AuthenticationFailed

level=error msg="executor error: artifact xxx failed to load: unable to download blob aaa/bbb/ccc/ddd/eee/data/jan: HEAD https://xxx.blob.core.windows.net/<container>/aaa/bbb/ccc/ddd/eee/data/jan\n--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
RESPONSE 403: 403 Server failed to authenticate the request. Make sure the value of Authorization header is formed correctly including the signature.
ERROR CODE: AuthenticationFailed

Any idea what might be the reason?
The SAS token signature is provided with '%3D' at the end instead of '=' - right?
Actually, I tried both.

entry.title: Re: Third-party cookies deprecation for SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content: OOTB, SAP Commerce Cloud doesn't rely on 3rd party cookies for any functionality. But I guess that's not only what you're asking?

entry.title: Re: period closing has not yet taken placeMessage No. CK763
entry.content:
Hello Aswanth,

Kindly check MMPV transaction for period closure or read SAP note 2175035 for more details of this error.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Connectivity With S/4 HANA System & SAP Analytics Cloud : Technical Configura
entry.content:
Hello,

How can I execute the "Connect and Configure the Data Provisioning Agent" when may system's are in the SAP RISE Private Cloud, please ? I would like to create a new connection between S/4HANA an Datasphare but when I select this option I can see this adverstiment "

“There is no registered adapter available for this connection type. Please register the ABAPAdapter adapter to a connected Data Provisioning Agent if you want to use remote tables via Data Provisioning Agent.”

Thanks an regards

Francesc S.

entry.title: Information about an APP
entry.content:
Dear team,

For compliance Issues, we need to install an external APP called AIDE (Advanced Intrusion Detection Environment ). It's a file and directory integrity checker. We need to know if this is compatible with our SAP enviroments and if it's safe to install. Could you give us some information?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Information about an APP
entry.content:
Hi Customer,

 

SAP doesn't specifically recommend or disapprove the use of AIDE , or any other host-based intrusion detection system.

 

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: SAP Cyrstal Reports 2020 64 bit and Oracle 19c Databa...
entry.content: I created System DSN as CR Oracle Cilent 7.1.6 and CR Oracle Wire Protocol ODBC Driver 8.0.2. They connects very fast but this time I can not see neither tables nor views.

entry.title: Re: How to extract a report of blocked 101 mov with the P...
entry.content:
Hi,

Goto ME2N and in dynamic selection select Good receipt.

In the processing of production and process orders, the indicator specifies whether a goods receipt is allowed and expected for the order item.

If the indicator is set, the order item is relevant to inventory management. The indicator is set during the creation of the order if the order is settled in respect of a material or a sales order item.

Regards

entry.title: S4HC Adding Logic to Custom Business Objects
entry.content:
I've been following along with the tutorial on Implement Logic for a Custom Business Object 

In there they say to implement additional logic for After Modification and Before Save  - and as per the SAP Help

But is there some trick to getting this code to execute on the create event when using the application ?.  My published application has the actioned as actions links on the menu bar instead that I need to click on.  I want to create a record and for it to automatically trigger them on those events and I don't want those 2 to appear on the menu bar.

entry.title: Re: DIEN or Service masters?
entry.content:
Hi,

The DIEN material type in the SD module, In Plant Maintenance if you're using DIEN material type the process will be similar to PM02, where there is no service entry sheet, and the goods receipt (GR) is processed directly.

You can also refer to this link DIEN material type in PM order 

Regards

entry.title: Re: Combining SAP Fiori Freestyle and List Report Pages i...
entry.content: Hi...No, if you need a welcome page with multiple tiles that then redirect to LR page, this welcome page has to be a complete custom page! This is nothing that can be built into the standard fe LR template.

entry.title: Re: Process Order Confirmation
entry.content:
Hello CharlesNwankwo ,

When you perform confirmation, I am considering that process order is posting GR along with operations confirmation in your system.so order will show status as CNF DLV. now user have cancelled confirmation so in this case ideally 102 movement has to be posted automatically to revert GR movement along with reverting operations confirmation.

check status of order and check material documents of the order so that you will get idea on this topic.

entry.title: Questions re: "Multi-model with SAP HANA Cloud" developer challenge
entry.content:
This discussion thread is for you to ask your questions and discuss issues if you are participating in the June 2024 developer challenge. The topic is "Multi-model processing with SAP HANA and Python in SAP Business Application Studio."

Please use separate discussions created for the submission of your solutions. Keep this thread for your questions only.

entry.title: CDS Query: Filter on dimensions not showing
entry.content:
Hi Fellow Experts,

I'm trying to create a CDS consumption query based on standard billing CDS (I_BillingDocExtdItem) with additional association to my custom material master CDS view for material master info.

However, when I tried to open the CDS query in AfO (Analysis for Office), I'm unable to filter with the values for each of the dimensions selected in the query.

Appreciate if anyone can point out what did i missed in my CDS and query.

Analysis for Office, no available members when trying to apply filter

 

CDS Query

Source CDS

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Want to delete DRAFT entries in bulk mode
entry.content:
Hi labindia123,

Refer to SAP Note 3450729 for the same.

The new functionality is provided in SAP Business One 10.0 FP 2405.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: ACRONYMS IN THE GROUPS FOR TAXBLE EVENTS
entry.content:
Hello Ismael,

the Tax events referreing this ADGs are for the Country BA - Bosnia and Herzegovina and hence they are prefixed with BA.

 

Regards,
Harshal

entry.title: Sending mail to user when release code is updated in PO creation
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement whenever I create PO using ME21N if release strategy is activated, that time Email Notification has to be triggered per release code.

Please help me in this as I am new to ABAP.

Regards,

Dharani

entry.title: Monitoring QRFC queue which are in Ready status ?
entry.content:
how to monitor SMQ1 & SMq2 which are in "Ready" status 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Monitoring QRFC queue which are in Ready status ?
entry.content:
In system Monitoring there are 2 data collectors checking qRFC:

  • qRFC backlog
  • qRFC errors

Review which one delivers and fits your requirement. Non of them are checking ready status, therefore if you need to check this concrete status, you can copy the data collector and add corresponding feature via ABAP coding.

2484872 - Requested metric not included in standard templates

Review guide •Development of Customer Data Provider Pull RFC
This guide provides a step by step guide to developing a customer pull RFC data provider.

Regards,

Luis Salazar

entry.title: Re: Production order confirmation via custom design
entry.content:
Hello @robert_altenstraer 

Would you please elaborate your response? The OP has not mentioned serial numbers. Why are you referring to them and to equipments?

Cheers, Dominik

entry.title: Re: 2 BO groups of conflicting folder permissions
entry.content: Without having tested it, my guess is that full control wins.

entry.title: Re: ACRONYMS IN THE GROUPS FOR TAXBLE EVENTS
entry.content: Hi HarshalVakil,

entry.title: Re: Certification exam on SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
there is a page for it. https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-associate-reporting-modelling-and-data-acquisition-with-sap-bw-4hana

The Datasphere part account only for 10% (maximum 20% with BW Bridge, that is basically BW4).

So from now on you need a full certification on BW4 + all datasphere + all BW Bridge.

Seems a little too broad.

entry.title: Re: ACRONYMS IN THE GROUPS FOR TAXBLE EVENTS
entry.content: Hi Harshal, thank you 🙂

entry.title: Re: NCO 2.0 and UNICODE compatibility
entry.content:
Actually, that's a brilliant idea... But it is a bit "shooting sparrows with cannons", isn't it... 🙂
Maintaining an entire R/3 system just to use it as a "call forwarder"...

entry.title: How to uncheck Exchange Rate Fixed Indicator in a P.O. that has already GR & IR?
entry.content: How to uncheck "Exchange Rate Fixed Indicator" in a P.O. that has already GR & IR?

entry.title: Re: Best Way to Reserve Stock Without MRP Impact
entry.content:
Hi,

Utilize the MRP Area functionality to manage your stock. Transfer your existing stock to a designated storage location and then exclude this specific storage location from MRP calculations using the MRP Area feature.

Regards.

entry.title: Re: NCO 2.0 and UNICODE compatibility
entry.content:
Actually, I don't think that this is a good idea. You should plan for an upgrade of the application to the latest NCo version (3.1) to get rid of outdated and unsecure old .NET framework and NCo versions.

Best regards,
Markus

entry.title: Re: Mark Prices of Actual Costing Ledger Run error
entry.content: Hi Ernesto , Thanks for your reply.

entry.title: Re: Governance of application-agnostic legal business-partner hierarchies
entry.content: It is outlined on the roadmap as product vision, detailed planning timeline yet to be disclosed.

entry.title: Re: New CIO Guide: Identity Lifecycle in SAP Landscapes
entry.content: It seems the direction is for web based apps running on BTP, SAP intend to move away completely to OIDC from SAML? Thanks.

entry.title: Re: How to Sale Product Scrap in Sap BYD.
entry.content:
Hello Ankit,

 

when you complete the production, if the product is damaged then you can receive the same in the inventory with the Restricted flag (this will allow the damaged products not to be sold in sales order).
you would then need to perform change of stock ( if the Output product from production is different from scrap Item that you are selling) and convert the restricted stock to scrap product
Use the scrap product in the sales order to sell or use the output product in the sales order ( with restricted flag)

 

Note that this woould generate finacial postings based on the valuations of the products, so make sure to test the process in test system first.

Regards,

Harshal

entry.title: Re: SAP AI Core Azure Blob storage SAS token RESPONSE 403...
entry.content:
Hi @thomasweckerbasf,

sounds like encoding challenges. Encountered this in the CPI http adapter before. Have a look at this note https://me.sap.com/notes/0003131448 to resolve with triple encoding .

KR Martin

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Launchpad: New Fast and Easy Option to Adapt SAP-delivered Launchpad Content (for On
entry.content:
Hi Ruth, 

thanks for the awesome blogpost. This would really help in a lot of projects to keep the content manageable. However, I wanted to ask if there is a restriction regarding backend catalogues delivered by SAP as i tried to change the title of a tile or the icon and getting the error "Error while trying to save". Is this due to the nature of replicable catalogues? If this would be the case, I think we can't use the feature because we would have to adapt tiles in different ways and this would be contraproductive to keep the content manageable.

Release is S/4 and FES 2022/01

Thanks in advance!
Marius

entry.title: Re: How to check Local Table size in sap datasphere
entry.content:
Hi @PongsatornK,

If you have access only to Datasphere - then you can check the count of records by creating an SQL view on top of the local table. But if you have a database analysis user, then you can check also the size of the consumed memory by querying SYS.M_TABLES view. Also you can add this view to the monitoring space (defined in configuration) - then this information will be available for anyone with access to this space.

entry.title: Re: Edge Integration Cell Setup with AWS
entry.content:
Hi @HuyNguyen ,did you finally make it work or are you still struggling with this error?

Let us know

Regards

Mattia

entry.title: Issue with Prod Order Yield Confirmation - Missing serial number
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am facing an issue with a part of the request payload missing - " <ns2:serialNumber>17</ns2:serialNumber> " for the transaction " Production Order Yield Confirmation ", due to which this transaction is failing in the scenario explained below-

Scenario 1: Orders released on MAT 83 which has a serial profile(in ERP) on:

  • If orders are processed on DM without making modifications to SFC, ie without serialization the payload is (Notable lines - 22 to 26)- 
<ns2:yieldConfirmationRequest xmlns:ns2="http://sap.com/xi/ME/erpcon">
    <ns2:messageID>3690f8b3-2f45-49c9-92bd-1cefd154d272</ns2:messageID>
    <ns2:plant>0001</ns2:plant>
    <ns2:orderNumber>1001579</ns2:orderNumber>
    <ns2:operation>
        <ns2:operation>1001579-0-0030</ns2:operation>
        <ns2:version>ERP001</ns2:version>
    </ns2:operation>
    <ns2:routing>
        <ns2:routing>1001579</ns2:routing>
        <ns2:version>ERP001</ns2:version>
        <ns2:routerType>SHOP_ORDER</ns2:routerType>
    </ns2:routing>
    <ns2:material>
        <ns2:material>000000000000000083</ns2:material>
        <ns2:version>ERP001</ns2:version>
    </ns2:material>
    <ns2:sequence>not_defined</ns2:sequence>
    <ns2:stepId>0030</ns2:stepId>
    <ns2:reportingStep>0030</ns2:reportingStep>
    <ns2:productionVersion>PV1</ns2:productionVersion>
    <ns2:wipIdentifier>
        <ns2:sfc>000000000000000083-17</ns2:sfc>
        <ns2:serialNumber>17</ns2:serialNumber>
        <ns2:quantity>1.000000</ns2:quantity>
    </ns2:wipIdentifier>
    <ns2:storageLocation>0002</ns2:storageLocation>
    <ns2:batchData>
        <ns2:batchNumber>
        </ns2:batchNumber>
        <ns2:isLastReportingStep>true</ns2:isLastReportingStep>
    </ns2:batchData>
    <ns2:unitOfMeasure>EA</ns2:unitOfMeasure>
    <ns2:erpComponentsOption>ONLY_NON_BACKFLUSHED</ns2:erpComponentsOption>
    <ns2:rework>false</ns2:rework>
    <ns2:isEwmIntegrationActive>false</ns2:isEwmIntegrationActive>
    <ns2:disableGoodsReceipt>false</ns2:disableGoodsReceipt>
    <ns2:startDateTime>2024-06-04T06:13:17.562Z</ns2:startDateTime>
    <ns2:completeDateTime>2024-06-04T06:13:31.130Z</ns2:completeDateTime>
    <ns2:workCenter>DMC-WC</ns2:workCenter>
    <ns2:enteredByExternalUser>harsh@incture.com</ns2:enteredByExternalUser>
</ns2:yieldConfirmationRequest>
  • If orders are processed on DM after changing the SFC no, ie using serialization, the payload is(Notable lines 22 to 25) -
<ns2:yieldConfirmationRequest xmlns:ns2="http://sap.com/xi/ME/erpcon">
    <ns2:messageID>266836ef-8298-49ee-8d13-a54a0a548a40</ns2:messageID>
    <ns2:plant>0001</ns2:plant>
    <ns2:orderNumber>1001562</ns2:orderNumber>
    <ns2:operation>
        <ns2:operation>1001562-0-0030</ns2:operation>
        <ns2:version>ERP001</ns2:version>
    </ns2:operation>
    <ns2:routing>
        <ns2:routing>1001562</ns2:routing>
        <ns2:version>ERP001</ns2:version>
        <ns2:routerType>SHOP_ORDER</ns2:routerType>
    </ns2:routing>
    <ns2:material>
        <ns2:material>000000000000000083</ns2:material>
        <ns2:version>ERP001</ns2:version>
    </ns2:material>
    <ns2:sequence>not_defined</ns2:sequence>
    <ns2:stepId>0030</ns2:stepId>
    <ns2:reportingStep>0030</ns2:reportingStep>
    <ns2:productionVersion>PV1</ns2:productionVersion>
    <ns2:wipIdentifier>
        <ns2:sfc>MA1CH2F57B1234583</ns2:sfc>
        <ns2:quantity>1.000000</ns2:quantity>
    </ns2:wipIdentifier>
    <ns2:storageLocation>0002</ns2:storageLocation>
    <ns2:batchData>
        <ns2:batchNumber>
        </ns2:batchNumber>
        <ns2:isLastReportingStep>true</ns2:isLastReportingStep>
    </ns2:batchData>
    <ns2:unitOfMeasure>EA</ns2:unitOfMeasure>
    <ns2:erpComponentsOption>ONLY_NON_BACKFLUSHED</ns2:erpComponentsOption>
    <ns2:rework>false</ns2:rework>
    <ns2:isEwmIntegrationActive>false</ns2:isEwmIntegrationActive>
    <ns2:disableGoodsReceipt>false</ns2:disableGoodsReceipt>
    <ns2:startDateTime>2024-06-04T05:53:55.368Z</ns2:startDateTime>
    <ns2:completeDateTime>2024-06-04T05:54:06.749Z</ns2:completeDateTime>
    <ns2:workCenter>DMC-WC</ns2:workCenter>
    <ns2:enteredByExternalUser>harsh@incture.com</ns2:enteredByExternalUser>
</ns2:yieldConfirmationRequest>

KEY DIFFERENCE: The payload <ns2:serialNumber> is being skipped when we are serializing SFC in the above scenario. This resulted in the failure of this transaction with the following error - 

 

QUESTION: Is this happening due to any missing configuration or not I'm unable to identify it. Can you please help on this matter? 

Scenario 2: Orders released on MAT 23 which doesn't have a serial profile(in ERP) on:

In this case, the transaction for " Production Order Yield Confirmation " is not failing and sync is happening irrespective of whether SFC is being serialized or not.

Please let me know if we are missing something or is there any additional config that may be needed for this scenario. Any help will be valuable.

Thanks & Regards,
Harsh.

SAP Digital Manufacturing

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - Teams Screen Sharing - Android Phone
entry.content:
This is a current limitation build into Build Apps. I have created an improvement request ti change it. Please vote on it.

BR Christian

entry.title: Re: Infotype 2001 keep opening screen number 2000 but onl...
entry.content:
Hi,

In your example the  PS grouping is '91'. Can you confirm for the user with the issue is it also '91' ? Maybe best to test with the same employee.

Brendan

entry.title: Re: Integration context between SuccessFactors EC and SAP...
entry.content:
you can read about Cloud identity service in the guide What Are Cloud Identity Services? | SAP Help Portal

There is a high-level graphic on section What are the Could Identity Services

*Please consider marking this answer as solution if your question was properly answered

entry.title: Defining Custom Partner Functions for BDRs and Invoices of Service Contracts
entry.content:
Introduction

Recently we found that many SAP customers want to define their own partner functions (also called Z partner functions) and pass them from service contracts to the subsequent billing request documents (BDRs) and invoices.

In this blog, you’re going to understand the business background lying behind and learn how to define custom partner functions for service contracts in your SAP S/4HANA Cloud system.

Business Background

We have the following typical uses cases:

  • Customer bank account
    Your customer has different bank accounts in several banks. The customer has a default bank account, which they can make payment with. The bank account is also dependent on the transaction currency. In some special cases the bank account needs to be modified on the transaction level.
  • Additional contact persons
    You want to add more than one contact person to a service contract. All the contact persons can be found in both BDRs and invoices of the service contract.
  • Administrator
    In some small or medium enterprises, an administrator role may manage the back-office tasks as a partner.

Solution

Roles required in the above-mentioned business scenarios are different. However, all the roles can be regarded variants of business partners and therefore the issue can be solved in this way:

  1. Creating custom partner function in both SD (Sales and Distribution) and Service. That’s because Service Contract is a service transaction type while BDR and invoices are SD documents. In between, sales documents are used as intermediate documents.
  2. Map those partner functions so that they can be forwarded from service contracts to BDRs and subsequently to invoices.

How To

Let’s use the first case to demonstrate how to define a custom partner function for a bank.

With a configuration expert role or as a key user, you go to the Manage Your Solution app and choose Configure Your Solution. If you use the SAP Central Business Configuration, you can directly search for the configuration activities mentioned in the procedure.

1. Define a custom partner function in SD

Go to the Partner Functions tab in the configuration activity Set Up Partner Determination for Customer and Supplier Master. Configuration Activity for Partner Determination SD

Make sure you have a partner function named “Own Bank” or create a new entry per your own requirement. Define Partner Functions

2. Create a custom partner function in Service

2.1 Go to the configuration activity Define Partner Functions under Service -> General Settings -> Partner ProcessingDefine Partner Functions
2.2 Define a new partner function

For example, we name it ZB00001, Own Bank with Function Category 0000 and Relationship Category CRMH00 Is the Undefined Partner Of.

New Partner Function in ServiceNew Partner Function "Own Bank"

 2.3 Define new partner determination procedures

Go to the configuration activity Define Partner Determination Procedure in Service. Define Partner Determination Procedure in Service

 You define new partner determination procedures by copying the standard ones.

  • For service contract header, copy SCH10001 to make ZSCH1001
  • For service contract item, copy SCI00001 to make ZSCI0001

Copy Header and Item Partner Determination Procedures

New Partner Determination Procedures2.4 Add new partner function to your new partner determination procedures

New Partner Functions to Determination Procedures

 Add New Entry

  • For service contract header ZSCH1001For service contract header ZSCH1001

     

    For service contract header ZSCH1001

     

  • For service contract item ZSCI0001For service contract item ZSCI0001

 

For service contract item ZSCI0001

2.5 Assign new partner determination procedure to transaction type

Go to configuration activity Assign Partner Determination Procedure to Transaction Type and assign the header partner determination procedure ZSCH1001 (Service Contract Header New) to Service Contract (SC1). Assign Partner Determination Procedure to Transaction Types

 

Assign Partner Determination Procedure to Transaction Types
2.6 Assign partner determination procedure to item categories

Go to configuration activity Assign Partner Determination Procedure to Item Categories. Assign the item partner determination procedure ZSCI0001 (Service Contract Item New) to service contract item categories (SCN1, SCN2, SCN3). Assign Partner Determination Procedure to Item Categories

 

Assign Partner Determination Procedure to Item Categories

3. Map Service partner functions to SD partner functions

Go to the configuration activity Map Partner Functions to map the partner functions. 

Map Partner Functions

Map Partner FunctionsNew Mapping Entry

 

4. Set up partner determination procedures for sales document and billing documents

This step makes the system automatically to copy partner data from service contracts to billing documents through sales documents. Here we only demonstrate the steps for setting up partner determination for sales document header.

SD Partner Determination

4.1 Add partner function OB Own Bank to the partner determination procedure SO02 Sales Order.

Partner Determination SO02

 

Add New Partner Function

 

Find OB Own Bank

 

OB Added to SO02

 

 

4.2 Assign partner determination procedure to relevant sales documents and billing documents

Go to the Partner Determination Procedure Assignment tab, make sure that the partner determination procedure SO02 Sales Order (used as intermediate document of service contract BDR) is assigned to the sales document type (BSC) for service contract BDRs. If not, you can carry out the assignment. Partner Determination Procedure Assignment

Note that you do the same for billing document header. The following table gives you the necessary data:  

Configuration for ...Partner Determination ProcedurePartner Determination Procedure Assignment (Document Type)
Sales document headerSO02Assigned to BSC (Service Contract BDR)
Sales document item/*/*
Billing document headerFor BDR, use FK Assigned to  SVTB (Service Contract BDR)
For invoice, use CI01 Assigned to F2 (Invoice)
Billing document item/*/*
*We found it not necessary to make the settings for the item level. The partner can be automatically forwarded to the item level. 

Configuration Activity for Billing Header

 4.3 Assign account group 

Go to the Account Groups – Function Assignment tab, make sure you have the partner function OB assigned to account group CUST customers.Account Groups

 

New Entry for Account Group

 If you use the system OB Own Bank, this is the last step for the settings.

4.4 Partner function conversion

If you have customized your own partner function (e.g. ZB), you need to perform one more step for the partner function conversion.Partner Function Converstion

5. Test what you have set up for Own Bank

To test the additional partner Own Bank in business, make sure you have the relevant business roles to access the applications:

  1. Customer Service Manager role for service contract apps
  2. Billing clerk role for billing apps
5.1 Check in Manage Service Contracts app

Go to the Manage Service Contracts app and create a service contract with an item (SCN1 standard service contract item).Manage Service Contracts app

 

5.2 Use Own Bank as a partner

Go to the Parties Involved tab and choose Own Bank for both the header and item. Then release this service contract for follow-up billing procedure. The service contract ID is 7000003021.Choose Own Bank

 

Release Entire Contract and Item

5.3 Create billing document requests

Go to the Schedule Billing Document Requests app for service contracts. Create BDR for the service contract 7000003021.Schedule BDR Creation app

 

Create a New Job for Service Contract

 

Go to Job Log

 

Select a BDR

 Copy the BDR number from the job log. Let's use BDR 1000007049.

5.4 Check Own Bank in BDR

Go to the Manage Billing Document Requests app to see details about the BDR 1000007049. You can see that the partner Own Bank is there.Find Manage Billing Document Requests app

 

Find the BDR

 

Go to Header Partner

 

Find Own Bank

 Go to the item overview, you can also find Own Bank in the item partners.Own Bank at BDR Item Level

6. Create invoice and check Own Bank

So far, the custom partner Own Bank can only be forwarded from service contract to the BDR (a type of sales document). If you want it to be forwarded from the BDR to the invoice (a billing document). Perform the following steps.

6.1 Create an invoice based on BDR

Create Billing Documents app

 Find BDR and Create Billing Documents

 

6.2 Check Own Bank at the header level of the invoice

Check Own Bank in Invoice Header

 

In the Manage Billing Documents app, when you go to the item-level business partners, you can only view the business partners that are specifically assigned to the item, not the partners inherited from the header.

6.3 Check Own Bank at the item level of the invoice

Go to the Display Billing Documents app (based on GUI) to view the custom business partner Own Bank at the item level.Check Own Bank at Item Level

Conclusion

In this blog, we explained to you the business requirements of customizing your own business partners for service contracts. Following that, we also demonstrated you how to add a custom partner and map it for service contracts step by step. Subsequently, the custom business partner chosen in a service contract was forwarded to billing document requests and finally to invoices.

You can have a try in your own system. If you have further questions, please ask a question or comment under this blog.

entry.title: Re: Can you remove Onboarding business process error mess...
entry.content: This is already Enabled in provisioning

entry.title: Re: STMS : Import Queue could not be opened.
entry.content:
Hi Naeem,

I also experienced same issue and in my case /usr/sap/trans was no longer mounted and I got same error when I access the Import Queue via STMS.

Resolution: I re-mounted /usr/sap/trans and that's how I resolved this issue. Thanks

Regards,

Andries

entry.title: Is it possible to change setting of list report filter?
entry.content:
Hi all, I am using fiori template - list report to generate CAP App. I found that all the drop-down filter fields are only list 10 results or less, also I found below message - "READ AE { '$select': 'department_name,email', '$skip': '0', '$top': '10' }" in the application log.

So, is it possible to change or eliminate restrictions of only return top 10 records?

Thanks a lot.

entry.title: Re: New CIO Guide: Identity Lifecycle in SAP Landscapes
entry.content:
Hi @secure_sap 

it is a question of features and scenarios. Certain features will only be implemented with OIDC because the protocol foresees them already. If you configure Cloud Identity as in the reference architecture the IAS will translate from one technology to the other - if possible (IdP initiated SSO is not possible via OIDC for security reasons).

if you have to decide now for a new configuration we recommend OIDC.

OIDC offers backend communication which is common between micro services. This is especially the case for BTP applications and services. For other stacks SAML might remain sufficient and IAS will create the proper assertion for that app.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA - Empowering Your Homepage: Enabling My Home for SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS0
entry.content:
Thanks for the insight @Setu_Saxena. We have the required versions. All mentioned features work, except the insights, so we will open a ticket.

The documentation is a bit sketchy about how to arrange the news feeds (rss). I was able to configure it via the Flexibility Services. Is there another way to administer this?
